title: Navigate from Home to Projects using sidebar navigation
description: Verifies that clicking the Projects navigation link routes to /projects and renders Projects page content.

title: Navigate from Home to Dashboard using sidebar navigation
description: Verifies that clicking the Dashboard navigation link routes to /dashboard and renders Dashboard page content.

title: Mobile menu: open collapsed menu and navigate to Contact
description: Verifies that the collapsed mobile menu can be opened and used to navigate to /contact with Contact content visible.

steps.description: Click on the mobile menu toggle button
Verify element "mobile navigation menu" is visible
Click on "Contact" in the mobile navigation menu

title: Direct navigation to About route loads About page content
description: Verifies that the About page renders correctly when loaded directly via its static route.

title: Navigation link failure scenario: click About but remain on Home
description: Validates expected behavior for a known navigation failure scenario where clicking About does not change route or page content.

title: Navigate from Home to Achievements using navigation
description: Verifies that clicking the Achievements navigation link routes to /achievements and renders Achievements page content.

title: Navigate from Projects to Contact using in-app navigation (no direct URL)
description: Verifies in-app navigation works across pages by moving from Projects to Contact via navigation links.

title: Projects: Open a project card to view details/expanded content
description: Verifies a user can browse the Projects list and open a project card to see more details or expanded content.

steps.description: Scroll to the project list section

title: Projects: Open and close expanded project content
description: Verifies a project card expansion can be opened and then dismissed without breaking the page.

steps.description: Scroll to the project list section
Verify element "Project details" is not visible

title: About: View skills and biography sections
description: Verifies the About page renders biography and skills content and remains readable while scrolling.

title: About: Interact with a UI button or card and see the expected response
description: Verifies an interactive UI element on the About page responds (e.g., expands, reveals content, or changes visible state).

steps.description: Scroll to a section that contains an interactive card or button
Click a visible UI button or card on the About page

title: Achievements: Scroll through achievements list and confirm content is visible
description: Verifies the Achievements page loads and the achievements list content is visible while scrolling.

steps.description: Scroll to the achievements list section

title: Achievements: Verify images and text render without visible broken placeholders
description: Verifies achievements entries show readable text and visible images (no obvious missing/broken image presentation).

steps.description: Scroll to the first achievement entry

title: Projects: Negative interaction check—click a UI element that should not produce a broken state
description: Verifies clicking a secondary UI element on Projects does not result in visible broken UI (e.g., missing image placeholder text or error text).

steps.description: Scroll to the project list section
Click a visible secondary UI element within a project card (for example, an icon, tag, or small button)
Verify text "Not Found" is not visible

title: Dashboard: View analytics dashboard content renders
description: Verifies the Dashboard page loads and key dashboard content is visible.

title: Contact: View contact page and confirm key contact UI elements are visible
description: Verifies the Contact page loads and shows contact content or a contact form area.

title: Default dark mode theme renders correctly on Home
description: Verifies the Home page loads in dark mode with key aesthetics visible and readable.

steps.description: Verify element "glassmorphism card or panel" is visible
Verify element "gradient background or orb" is visible

title: Theme toggle switches from dark to light mode on Home
description: Verifies clicking the theme toggle changes the visible UI to light mode without breaking basic navigation visibility.

steps.description: Verify element "light mode indicator" is visible
Verify element "page content area" is visible

title: Theme toggle switches back to dark mode after enabling light mode
description: Verifies the theme can be toggled back to dark mode and the UI remains readable.

steps.description: Verify element "light mode indicator" is visible
Verify element "dark mode indicator" is visible

title: Theme persists while navigating from Home to Projects via UI navigation
description: Verifies after toggling theme, navigating to another page via clicks keeps the UI readable and themed.

steps.description: Verify element "light mode indicator" is visible
Verify element "light mode indicator" is visible

title: Theme toggle does not obscure content on About page after navigation
description: Verifies that after changing theme on Home and navigating to About, text and key sections remain visible.

steps.description: Verify element "light mode indicator" is visible
Verify element "primary content section" is visible

title: Detect theme rendering error: content becomes unreadable after switching to light mode
description: Checks for a regression where toggling to light mode causes missing/overlapped content or unreadable UI.

steps.description: Verify element "page content area" is visible
Verify element "no full-page overlay blocking content" is visible

title: Theme toggle remains functional and UI remains visible on Dashboard
description: Verifies theme switching works on a secondary route and does not break layout or hide dashboard content.

steps.description: Verify element "dashboard content area" is visible
Verify element "light mode indicator" is visible
Verify element "dashboard content area" is visible

title: Route transition animation from Home to About is smooth and completes
description: Verifies that navigating from Home to About via the primary navigation shows a visible transition and lands on the About page without UI freeze.

steps.description: Verify element "About page main heading" is visible

title: Route transition animation from Home to Projects is smooth and content renders correctly
description: Verifies that navigating from Home to Projects shows a visible transition and the Projects content appears without missing or overlapping sections.

steps.description: Verify element "Primary navigation bar" is visible
Verify element "Project list or project grid" is visible

title: Shared element transition behaves correctly when navigating Home to Projects
description: Verifies that any shared element animation (e.g., hero/project card image/title) completes and the destination element is visible and stable on Projects.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured project card or featured project section" is visible
Verify element "Project list or project grid" is visible
Verify element "A project card image or title" is visible

title: Quick successive navigation does not freeze the UI (Home -> About -> Projects)
description: Verifies that consecutive route transitions do not leave the UI stuck mid-transition and final route content is interactive and visible.

steps.description: Verify element "Project list or project grid" is visible

title: Transitions remain stable when scrolling after navigation (Home -> Achievements)
description: Verifies that after a route transition, the page can be scrolled and content remains stable (no major layout shift that breaks readability).

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page

title: No blank screen during transition (Home -> Contact)
description: Verifies that route transition does not result in a prolonged blank page and the destination content becomes visible promptly.

steps.description: Verify element "Primary navigation bar" is visible

title: Return navigation transition is smooth (About -> Home)
description: Verifies that navigating back to Home via navigation from About triggers a smooth transition and Home content is shown correctly.

steps.description: Verify element "Home hero section" is visible
Verify element "Primary navigation bar" is visible

title: Detect transition failure symptoms (abrupt shift or frozen UI) when going Home -> About
description: Verifies that the transition does not freeze and that About content appears and remains usable shortly after navigation, indicating no failure.

steps.description: Verify element "Primary navigation bar" is visible
Wait for element "About page main heading" to appear
Verify element "About page main heading" is visible

title: Homepage entrance animations play sequentially on first load
description: Verifies that the homepage entrance animation sequence cascades in a visible, staged order on initial render.

steps.description: Verify element "Home page main heading" is visible
Verify element "Primary call-to-action button" is visible

title: Entrance animations show a clear cascade order (top content before lower sections)
description: Verifies that above-the-fold content appears before below-the-fold sections as part of a sequential entrance.

title: Homepage remains usable during entrance animations (no blocking overlay)
description: Verifies that entrance animations do not block interaction and the page is navigable while animations run.

steps.description: Verify element "Top navigation bar" is visible
Click on "About" in the top navigation
Verify element "About page heading" is visible

title: Entrance animations do not prevent navigation to Projects from the homepage
description: Verifies that user can navigate away from the homepage while entrance animations are occurring without errors.

steps.description: Verify element "Top navigation bar" is visible
Click on "Projects" in the top navigation
Verify element "Projects page heading" is visible

title: Entrance animations do not break localization text rendering on homepage
description: Verifies that animated elements still show readable text content (not blank) after initial render.

steps.description: Verify element "Home page main heading" is visible
Verify element "Hero description text" is visible

title: Switch language on Home page from English to Indonesian updates UI text instantly
description: Verifies the language switch control updates visible Home page UI text to Indonesian without a page reload.

title: Switch language on Home page from Indonesian back to English restores UI text
description: Verifies the language switch control can toggle back to English and the UI updates accordingly.

title: Switch language on Projects page updates project UI strings to Indonesian
description: Verifies that switching language on the Projects page translates visible labels and UI strings to Indonesian.

title: Language preference persists when navigating from Home to About after switching to Indonesian
description: Verifies that after switching language, navigating to another route keeps the selected language applied.

steps.description: Click on the "About" link in the main navigation

title: Language preference persists when navigating from Projects to Home after switching to Indonesian
description: Verifies that switching language on Projects keeps Indonesian text when returning to Home via navigation.

steps.description: Click on the "Home" link in the main navigation

title: Language switch control is available across key pages (Home, Projects, Contact)
description: Verifies that the language switch control is visible on multiple pages where users can access it.

steps.description: Click on the "Projects" link in the main navigation
Click on the "Contact" link in the main navigation

title: No partial or untranslated key navigation strings after switching to Indonesian on Home page
description: Detects i18n coverage gaps by verifying multiple expected Indonesian navigation labels appear after switching.

title: No partial or untranslated key page headings after switching to Indonesian on Projects page
description: Detects i18n coverage gaps on Projects by verifying an Indonesian heading appears and the English heading disappears.

title: Dashboard renders analytics charts with populated data
description: Verifies the analytics dashboard shows visible charts populated with fetched analytics data.

title: Dashboard shows loading state while analytics data is fetching
description: Verifies the dashboard shows a loading indicator/state before charts fully render.

steps.description: Wait for element "Visits chart" to appear

title: Dashboard handles API failure by showing an error state
description: Verifies the dashboard shows an error message and placeholder/empty visualizations when analytics data cannot be loaded.

title: Dashboard retry action attempts to recover from an error state
description: Verifies the dashboard provides a retry action after an error and transitions away from the error state when data loads.

steps.description: Wait for text "Try again" to appear
Wait for element "Visits chart" to appear
Verify text "Try again" is not visible

title: Dashboard renders chart containers even when there is no analytics data
description: Verifies the dashboard still renders chart sections with empty/placeholder messaging when the dataset is empty.

steps.description: Wait for element "Visits chart" to appear

title: Dashboard page has expected title and stable route
description: Verifies the dashboard loads on the correct route and presents a clear page title/header for analytics.

title: Resume/CV download button is discoverable and labeled clearly on Contact
description: Verifies the download button is easy to locate and has clear visible labeling on the Contact page.

title: Home page loads with core assets visible and within an acceptable time
description: Verifies the Home page renders key visible UI elements promptly, indicating JS/CSS/assets are delivered successfully via CDN.

steps.description: Verify element "Site header navigation" is visible
Verify element "Main content area" is visible

title: Home page renders styled layout (no obvious unstyled content)
description: Validates that CSS is applied by checking for typical styled UI elements being visible and properly laid out (proxy for CSS asset delivery).

steps.description: Verify element "Site header navigation" is visible
Verify element "Primary call-to-action button" is visible
Verify element "Page content is readable (not blank)" is visible

title: Subsequent navigation to Projects is fast and content loads without blank states
description: Ensures client-side navigation and cached CDN assets allow quick transition from Home to Projects with visible content.

steps.description: Verify element "Site header navigation" is visible
Click on "Projects" in the header navigation
Verify element "Projects list or projects grid" is visible

title: Cross-page navigation sequence remains smooth (Home -> About -> Achievements)
description: Checks multiple route transitions for consistent rendering, indicating assets remain available and cached during navigation.

steps.description: Click on "About" in the header navigation
Verify element "About page main heading" is visible
Click on "Achievements" in the header navigation

title: Refresh on Projects page still loads content (CDN-delivered build artifacts available)
description: Validates the deployed build serves required JS/CSS on a direct page load, not only via client-side navigation.

steps.description: Verify element "Projects list or projects grid" is visible
Verify element "Site header navigation" is visible

title: Graceful handling: broken image/asset does not crash page rendering
description: Ensures that if an image/asset fails to load, the page still renders surrounding UI and navigation remains usable (graceful degradation).

steps.description: Verify element "Main content area" is visible
Verify element "Projects preview cards" is visible
Click on "Projects" in the header navigation
Verify element "Projects list or projects grid" is visible

title: Graceful handling: missing styles should be detectable as a visible broken UI signal
description: Provides a visible failure signal check to catch cases where CSS fails to deliver (e.g., unstyled page still shows raw text).

steps.description: Verify element "Site header navigation" is visible
Verify element "Primary call-to-action button" is visible
Click on "About" in the header navigation
Verify element "About page main heading" is visible
Verify element "Page layout sections (not a single unformatted text block)" is visible

title: Dashboard route loads without missing-asset blank screen
description: Verifies a heavier/interactive page still renders key visible elements, indicating asset delivery and hydration are working in production.

steps.description: Verify element "Dashboard content area" is visible
Verify element "Site header navigation" is visible
